leadText: Windswept Run (Japanese: 風抜け道 Windswept Path) is an area located in the central region of the Obsidian Fieldlands of Hisui. It is connected to Deertrack Path to the north, Deertrack Heights to the east, and Nature's Pantry to the southeast.

sections.title: Geography
sections.text: Geography [ edit | edit source ] Windswept Run encompasses the entirety of the eastern shoreline of the Obsidian Fieldland's central landmass. It continues from the rocky base of Deertrack Heights. It has vast sandy shores that gently connect to the river. Large patches of grass can be found up from the shore and be hidden in.
